entry.title: Re: How to dynamically pass parameters to SimbaDSN in code
entry.content:
Are you getting an error when you run you try to set up the ODBC DSN?  When you run your code?  If so, what is the error message?

Passing parameters to the report should not be any different than with any other type of data connection.  However, I don't see in the supported platforms document that Crystal supports connections to Google BigQuery, so you probably won't be able to use that for data in Crystal.

-Dell

entry.title: Código de referencia de Bybit: 72963
entry.content:
¿Qué es el código de referencia de Bybit?

Se prefiere el código de referencia más alto de Bybit como "72963". Es una característica que ofrece la plataforma de criptomonedas Bybit a sus usuarios. Este código es un número de referencia especial que los usuarios pueden utilizar al invitar a sus amigos a la plataforma.

entry.title: Re: Settings for B1if, Configuration DIProxiegroups on 2 B1i-Servers
entry.content: @Nidhi Singh Any advice on how many DI Proxies one should have? Is there any guide or calculations we could use to determine this?

entry.title: Código de Referencia KuCoin: QBA34DLJ
entry.content:
Kucoin Código de recomendación (opcional): QBA34DLJ

Cómo utilizar el código de referencia de Kucoin. Si busca ahorrar dinero en tarifas comerciales, regístrese utilizando el código de referencia de KuCoin "QBA34DLJ" para obtener un 20% de descuento y recibir un paquete de regalo de bienvenida con un valor de hasta 250 USDT.

Con la amplia gama de criptomonedas de KuCoin disponibles para operar y su interfaz fácil de usar, podrá operar con facilidad y conveniencia. ¡No espere, comience a operar con KuCoin hoy!

entry.title: Реферальный код Binance: ZNKAUKP3
entry.content:
Реферальный код Binance "ZNKAUKP3" — один из наиболее зарегистрированных уникальных кодов во всем мире. Ссылочный код на бирже Binance — это программа, созданная для того, чтобы рекомендовать пользователям биржу и предлагать различные преимущества.

Реферальный код Binance также произносится как код Binance ID, и между ними нет никакой разницы.

entry.title: Re: Error During TO Creation--Available quantity in bin is zero(Message no. L3019)

Hi, I have the same problem.

show me the same message,

entry.title: Kucoin Empfehlungscode: QBSTNYS4
entry.content:
Holen Sie sich einen Rabatt bei der Krypto-Börse KuCoin mit dem Empfehlungscode: "QBSTNYS4"

Der Kucoin-Empfehlungscode "QBSTNYS4“ ist ein einzigartiger Code, der es Benutzern ermöglicht, Freunde auf die Plattform einzuladen und im Gegenzug Belohnungen zu verdienen.

Wenn sich ein neuer Benutzer mit einem Empfehlungscode anmeldet, erhalten sowohl der Empfehlungsgeber als auch der neue Benutzer Boni, beispielsweise einen Prozentsatz der vom neuen Benutzer generierten Handelsgebühren. Das Empfehlungscodesystem ist ein gemeinsames Merkmal vieler Kryptowährungsbörsen und dient als Marketinginstrument, um neue Benutzer anzuziehen und bestehende Benutzer zu motivieren, ihr Netzwerk einzubringen.

Was ist der beste Kucoin Empfehlungscode?

Um den besten Kucoin-Empfehlungscode "QBSTNYS4“ zu finden, müssen Sie ein wenig recherchieren. Es stehen viele verschiedene Codes zur Verfügung, von denen jeder verschiedene Vorteile und Boni bietet. Es ist wichtig, Faktoren wie die prozentuale Provision und die Dauer des Codes zu berücksichtigen Bonus und alle damit verbundenen spezifischen Bedingungen oder Konditionen.

Eine der besten Möglichkeiten, einen guten Empfehlungscode zu finden, besteht darin, sich Online-Foren und Communities anzusehen, in denen Kucoin-Benutzer ihre Erfahrungen und Codes austauschen. Sie können auch nach Bewertungen und Empfehlungen seriöser Quellen suchen, um sicherzustellen, dass Sie das beste Angebot erhalten.

entry.title: Code de parrainage Kucoin: QBS2KKZ3
entry.content:
Le code de parrainage Kucoin "QBS2KKZ3" a été déterminé comme le code de parrainage le plus récent et ce code offre la remise de commission la plus élevée.

Le code de parrainage Kucoin est défini comme "QBS2KKZ3". Ce code offre la remise de commission la plus élevée sur chaque transaction que vous effectuez dans le cadre de transactions au comptant et à terme sur la bourse Kucoin.

Selon les données de Coinmarketcap, Kucoin fait partie des 5 principales bourses de crypto-monnaie avec le volume de transactions, la fiabilité et le nombre d'utilisateurs les plus élevés. Si vous envisagez de vous inscrire à Kucoin, entrez le code de parrainage > terminez le processus d'authentification > effectuez les tâches bonus à la dernière étape et ajoutez des coupons de remboursement en espèces et des frais de transaction à votre compte.

entry.title: Binance Futures Referral Code: HBBQFB0W
entry.content:
To get a 20% fee discount on Binance, you can enter the code ”HBBQFB0W” in the futures referral ID field when opening your Binance account.

Binance Futures Referral Code "HBBQFB0W" is a unique code that allows users to earn rewards for referring new traders to the Binance Futures platform. By sharing your referral code with others, you can receive a percentage of their trading fees as a commission. This is a great way to earn passive income while also helping to grow the Binance Futures community.

When you sign up for a Binance Futures account, you will be given your own referral code to share with friends, family, and followers. Anyone who signs up using your code will be linked to your account, and you will start earning rewards based on their trading activity. The more people you refer, the more potential earnings you can generate.

entry.title: Re: How to split an invoice for a single delivery with mu...
entry.content: Hi @daramex09 , you linked your question to the product SAP Order Management Foundation (OMF) (details: https://help.sap.com/viewer/product/SAP_Order_Management_Foundation/) but your question relates to ABAP-related order processing functionality. I would recommend removing this link as it doesn't relate to OMF.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
@YuchingLee 

Thank you for providing the detailed images. Based on the configuration and jobs I observed, it appears that the instance will have TIH enabled. However, the image you shared yesterday does not seem to show TIH as enabled. As a result, I am not confident about the current status of the instance. I recommend confirming the instance status before proceeding.

Regarding the risk associated with manual upgrades, it will only impact the competencies configured in the development goal. If the development goal does not have any competencies or skills configured, there should be no risk in performing the manual upgrade. However, if competencies are configured, it is important to halt the manual upgrade to avoid losing the competencies information.

Thanks,

Vicky

entry.title: Org Structure associated business partner ID is shown different for a Company ID
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Org Structure associated business partner ID is shown...
entry.content:
Once the Organizational Unit is already activated, there is no way to change the associated Business Partner ID .

Refer  KBA  https://me.sap.com/notes/2793335

entry.title: How to identify prorration period at rate step level
entry.content:
Hello to all,
I'm in a atypical situation, according to requirement when consuption cover a normal period I have to do calculation on monthly period basis but if I'm on a prorrated period like price changing or device replacement I have to do billing based on day period basis.
I've try using IF11, IF16 and IF17 variants but none of them do what I need.
Does anybody knows if this is posible?
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Data Action Advance Formula
entry.content:
Hi @pragi2028 , for that you just need to further reduce the scope of the calculation to take only the date Jan 2024 in the case of percentage, your advanced formula  should look like below, you need to set the measures and dimensions names to what you need, since it is needed for the whole year, you would need to loop the calculation for the whole date set, so in the below case, the value for date would remain constant for "Percentage" while for other measure, the date would be the whole of 2024.

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "202401" TO "202412"
FOREACH [d/Date]
	DATA([d/Measures] = "amount", [d/Cost Center] = "101", [d/GL] = "DIRECT") = (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Percentage", [d/Cost Center] = "101", [d/GL] = "A" , [d/Date] = "202401")/100)*RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "amount", [d/Cost Center] = "101", [d/GL] = "A" )
ENDFO

entry.title: Re: How to define ajax call in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hi Bill, Thanks for the update, could you please help what could be the exact URL path for "Destination" and "Registration" Under mobile services section API example Destination : https://XXXXX.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/<DestinationName>

Registration: https://XXXX.cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/odata/applications/v4/<ApplicationID>/Connections

we can directly add the URL or we need to add anything suffix.

Thanks,

Krishna.

@bill_froelich

entry.title: Re: Dynamic calendar view in SAC
entry.content: Hi @p2s the date filter is dynamic, let's assume that your live connection is bringing in data for the past 5 years as well as for the future 6 years, in that case, you would just need to change the values for look back and look ahead, this values are not fixed, the user can edit it in runtime while using the story, we are using this approach for our planning project, the same filter type, the only difference being we have an import model, where in we have 5 years of past & 5 years of present data, so when the user needs to see 10 years of data combines, they just needs to input 5 in look back & look ahead.

entry.title: The error in reversing entry of Asset Accounting
entry.content:
Hi, SAP experts.

I encountered an error stating “Cannot post in a different fiscal year” when attempting to reverse the fixed asset acquisition posting. The reversal was attempted on the exact same date as the original acquisition posting, specifically using the date January 1, 2024, for document date, posting date, and translation date.

In our system configuration, the ‘0L’ ledger follows an April to March fiscal year period, while the ‘2L’ ledger adheres to the calendar year. The reversal attempt was specifically made within the depreciation area of ledger ‘2L’.

I would greatly appreciate it if someone could explain the cause of this error and suggest how to resolve it. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: 固定资产-变更（异步）错误HTTP Code: 403 ( Forbidden )
entry.content:
您好，

我修改了一下payload.见txt附件. 您可以再尝试测一下。

<FixedAsset timeBasedValuationListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="false">
<ValidityStartDate>1900-01-01</ValidityStartDate>

这个日期需要和固定资产主数据 时间相关的那个日期相同

见pnp附件

Regards,

Sen

entry.content:
Dear Dell，

I tried using DSN-Less but it doesn't work. I put the "key file path" in the connection string

such as :

.Servername = "Driver={Simba ODBC Driver for Google BigQuery};OAuthMechanism=0;Email=your-service-account@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com;KeyFilePath=path\to\your\service-account-key-file.json;Catalog=your-project-id;"

 

But I set the Connection String in the crystal report tool and it can connect to the big query and get the data.

such as :

entry.title: ABAP RAP - Behavior Projection and Implementation Class
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am building a sample app to learn RAP. I created a BO with two fields. This BO has @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK annotation. This BO does not need any additional functionality hence after creating Behavior Definition, I thought I will skip creating behavior implemntation class and created service,

While testing the service, when I create a record, I get following error in the browser.

Runtime Error: 'RAISE_SHORTDUMP'. The OData request processing has been abnormally terminated. If you use SAP S/4HANA Cloud, please create an incident. Otherwise, if "Runtime Error" is not initial, launch ADT feed "Runtime Errors" or transaction ST22 / SM21 (system log analysis) for details and analysis.

In ADT, I can see following error(s)

Gateway error log - Backend Error: Metadata cache on hub system for current model is outdated

I also got another error, which I thought was not related to above.

The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a short dump.

The dump analysis revealed "The exception is related to the previous exception "CX_RAP_HANDLER_NOT_IMPLEMENTED" that occurred in
program "CL_RAP_BHV_PROCESSOR==========CP", in line 30 of include "CL_RAP_BHV_PROCESSOR==========CM01G". The reason for this exception
was: Handler not implemented; Method: GLOBAL_AUTHORIZATION, Involved Entities: ZC_LV_CAT_9000"

While trying to figure out how to resolve cache issue, I decided to create the implementation class which would fix the error, The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a short dump. however after creating the class, I did not write a single line of code and all the errors disappeared.

I am struggling to understand the relationship between the implemntation class and the other two errors. I'll appreciate any guidance in this context.

Regards

ASM

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
def void copyManyElements(String[] elements, String[] counts, Output output, MappingContext context) { 
  counts.each { it -> 
   def n = it as Integer; 
   if( n > 0 ) (elements[0..(n-1)]).each { e -> output.addValue( e ) } 
   output.addContextChange() 
  } 
}

This might be what does what you want.

entry.title: MRN2 does not change material price
entry.content:
Hi,

I have run MRN2 to devaluate a barely used material.

It seems that MRN2 process is correctly executed with no error from the result screen, but I can't find any price change document from the system(such as CKMPCSEARCH txn).

Please tell me why system can't change the material price.I have run with this material, plant"Material Movements" settings at initial screensettings at OMWV"Material Stocks" settings at initial screen(I don't know what this effects the result)"Base Price" settings: I only checked "Mat. Price Previous Year"I configured the Devaluation Percentages at Valuation area levelI checked "Direct update" at "Change Material Prices" buttonI didn't any settings at "Update Prices" areaIt seems that devaluation was carried out correctly

entry.title: Re: SAC - Hyperlink Story Page to Story Page from table u...
entry.content:
Hi @axel_  you can achieve the same using SAC URL API, this helps to take a set of arguments as filters for widgets in another story or page within the same story, there is no direct approach that I know of, you will need to do a little bit of scripting to achieve it.

SAP Analytics Cloud URL API

entry.title: Re: Authentication for e2e Test Automation on BTP with SA...
entry.content: I wouldn't use SAP ID service for testing. It is easy to configure IAS (Identity Authentication Service - Authentication) as the Identity provider for a subaccount. You have full control over the number of users and how they authenticate including certificate based login. I have not used this for automatic tests. But, I can imagine that it is easy to configure and execute compared to SAP ID service, where SAP has taken pains to ensure that only real users login and not bots.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 / AP Invoices received from a vendor business...
entry.content:
Hi Elisa!

I have two suggestions:

1)  Payment consolidation seems like the logical option here.  With newer versions you can manually set the consolidated BP on the actual AP Invoice (or GRPO).  IE, you do not need to permanently set it at the BPMD level.  So this way you can do a PO --> GRPO --> API, then on the accounting tab you will see active fields for "Consolidation Type" and "Consolidating BP".  You could also automate a "Delivery Consolidation" on the GRPO itself and then make the AP Invoice directly to the final vendor, Copy From the GRPO and it will be a nice chain.  You could use something like B1UP to prompt the receiving team to indicate the vendor that the shipment is being received from and this could auto-fill Consolidation Type = 'Delivery' and then the Consolidating BP (on the GRPO) to the one they have on the packing slip (this would allow you to go to the AP Invoice, put in the real final vendor and Copy From the GRPO direct).  If there are specific companies this is a big issue with then you could flag them on BPMD and validate that the receiver has checked a checkbox "Confirm Consolidated BP" (or whatnot) on the GRPO.

2)  If you know at the point of receiving, IE the packing slip from the vendor indicates the right BP, could you just require the receiving team to swap the BP on the PO prior to receiving?  This isn't as good as the dynamic consolidation option but again, if you can flag specific BPs that are prone to this type of thing and require a cross-check by the receivers then they should be able to change it.

B1UP would greatly help with checkboxes, automations and validations but even without it you can setup something similar.

I hope this helps,

Mike

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
Re: ODATA API Consumption SAP Datasphere - API filtering...
entry.content: I am not familiar with this service. But, in general with oData, FiscalYear is probably modeled as a String. So you have to put single quotes around it in $filter. Verify how Fiscal year appears in the result or check $metadata to ascertain its datatype.

entry.title: Please tell more about SAP Commerce Composable Payment Framework technically
entry.content:
Please tell more about SAP Commerce Composable Payment Framework.

We know that SAP Commerce Composable Payment Framework is released in Beta stage recently(3 weeks back). However, no technical details are available.

Please tell us more about the Technical solution or How the architecture of "SAP Commerce Composable Payment Framework" look like.

Also , Whether, it will require SAP Digital Payments Addon on SAP BTP? Separate Subscription etc?

Is it possible to implement SAP Composable payment Framework without SAP BTP? or can it connect to any Third party SAAS payment framework?

Also, we can find Open payment Framework in SAP UPscale Commerce , but SAP Upscale Commerce is very different from SAP Commerce Cloud.

We want answer from SAP Commerce Cloud Perspective.

Please help

entry.title: Re: CONFIG.READ_CALUCATED_MEMBER_VALUES
entry.content:
Hi Nono, 

   I assume your tenant deployed is still not on HANA Cloud.  

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Option for user to select versions in waterfall chart
entry.content:
Hi @vrajgopal you can create a calculation input control to achieve the same, to start with under measures you create a calculation of type "Restricted Measure"

Where in the selection context, you provide the measure used to store the values for different versions, under dimensions choose version, and as values for it create a calculation input control, this allows you to select the different versions available in the model, once this is done, an input control with the selected versions will be created the users can choose the version they need, this will act as input to your measure used in the water fall chart, also do take note that the waterfall chart takes only one measure as input at a time.

entry.title: Quota Arrangement in Make To Order Scenario
entry.content:
Dear All,                                                                                                                                                              We need to imply the quota arrangement in  MTO process.                                                                             We have maintained below Prerequisites for Quota Arrangements_                                                                    i.e. Vendor Info Record, Source List & Quota Arrangements are maintained.                                                              Splitting Quota Indicator is activated in MRP Lot Sizing Procedure

But after MRP run, purchase requisition are getting created for Single Vendor instead of getting split into vendors as per maintained quota.

Can anyone help in these case.                                                                                                                            Please  Reply 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Correct amortization passed mistakenly on an auc
entry.content: You have to specify account to avoid error AU133

entry.title: Re: SAC - Hyperlink Story Page to Story Page from table u...
entry.content:
Hi axel_, 

   You try the approach as mentioned in this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/hyperlinking-by-click-on-a-cell-in-a-table-in-sac-story/qaq-p/12312970

   You may achieve jump with context to another page, but not as directly hyperlink in table cell, instead, you can have the jump from right click on a data cell. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Integration with a GST Validation tool USING API IN SAP ABAP
entry.content: Please help regarding this requirement

entry.title: Re: Purpose of INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY
entry.content:
Thanks @Susanne_Helbig for your reply and sorry for late response. Here I have one question. What is the case if master data is maintained properly in the hierarchy, then in that case, we do miss the correct in our data action. Let's consider the below scenario : 

Now, I have added one more company code C14 which is already maintained in master data(dimension table) as shown below.

Now in this case, since all the members of the company code dimension is assigned to hierarchy and with the config script CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_NOT_IN_HIERARHCY_MEMBER, what members will it fetch ?

Thanks in advance. 

Regards,

Praveen.

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field in request material mdg fiori...
entry.content: For information on the extension of the Fiori app Request New Material(F0502) please refer to the help documentation: App Extensibility: Request Material.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow
entry.content: @Saurabh_Mittal  Did you get any work-around on this? We're facing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow
entry.content: No, I did not. Waiting for #SAP Build Process Automation community to help.

entry.title: Re: Nested JSON to SAP HANA Tables with SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi @Bais

I am not sure if I got your question correctly but if you're asking me why I multicast the message in two branches it's because as we have to insert data in two different tables so we have two structures, we can add them in the same Message mapping but then we would have to deal with the multi-message nodes in XML structure. I felt like this was easier and more efficient way to do it.

As for why we don't post the data directly, it's because here some data manipulation takes place without which we can't acquire the desired results.

I hope I made it clear please let me know!

Regards,

Harshal

entry.title: Re: Billing party wise Asset capitalization Report
entry.content:
Hi @PiyushDabhi 

The question answered earlier might be of help:

Solved: Asset report with Internal order - SAP Community

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content:
Hi, 

What Update site do you use to install from? Based on the error mesage you use 2023-09.

Try using the "latest" repository: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest

Best regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Lean Service Enablement for Project Networks
entry.content:
Hi Mario,

@Mario_Franz Thanks for sharing this exhaustive document. 

Background

We have commenced and is now a considerable way through our S/4 HANA upgrade we are an On-Premise customer and are upgrading from 1809 to 2022. While like most upgrade projects the scope is predominately a technical upgrade, We are also taking the opportunity to simplify our landscape by decommissioning SRM and implemented S/4 procurement, replacing the SRM procurement processes with S/4 Procurement, however we have hit a bit of a snag.

 

The Issue/Opportunity

A fundamental change is in the direction SAP is taking with S/4 Procurement is the migration from Classic Services to Lean Services, while in its purest form in procurement lean services have minimal impact across the business, however when we have dived into the broader procurement activities, in particular the implications on our Asset Management processes (the linking of Work Orders to NWA’s to Project to Purchase Orders), we have and are hitting a few roadblocks and complexities.

 

Our current understanding is that to enable Lean Services we will also need to convert any Service related PO's that use Classic Services, recreating them to now use Lean Services (as you can’t run both at the same time), but what does this actually means, what do we have too do, does the conversation process include a big bang approach of closing all active projects, service PO's, and re-creating them for Go Live Day, or is there an option to only convert those components related that related to Classic Services etc (specific NWA’s/WBS etc). Since we are implementing Lean services in BAU system, closing all Project/NWS/WO is last option for us. Is there way existing data can be converted to Lean services. Purticularly Project/NWA.

The other (and recent) challenge we have is the usage of time sheeting for Contractors (CATS), we rely on Contracts submitting Timesheets against this Service PO’s for both payment to them (or their Hire Company) and for cost allocation to the work they are completing, but what are the implications of this with the move to Lean Services, as only service entry sheets are supported in S/4 2022.

 

Regards

 

Sagar

entry.title: Re: Field for Training Provider at Item Level
entry.content: Hi @FredericMONEGER, I will say a ballpark figure is around 500 and upwards for now, given the various geographical locations that we are in. The number could grow with time. I agree that a referenced field is a lot more organized but the thought of building an additional process to create a new value every time a new provider is onboarded is something we need to assess. Do you happen to know if there is a KBA on the permissioning for "source" and best practice? I am curious if the permission can be delegated to learning administrator level rather than at a LMS System Admin level.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning Advanced formula code clarification.
entry.content:
This formula takes measure M1, but only if there are data in measure M2.

Multiplikation makes a join, *0+1 sets the join partner to 1 so that the left side is multiplied with 1 - but only if there are data on the right side.

entry.title: Re: Consume external OData as Batch Request
entry.content:
Thanks for clarification about "batch". I have checked this resource explaining OData Batch processing. Is it what you want?

If yes, then it seems it should be doable with ABAP - HTTP requests, using cl_http_client. But I did not tried it myself.
Only tricky part seems to be working with Multipart content type in request + response. But ABAP HTTP request has method "ADD_MULTIPART". For HTTP Multipart response I see "NUM_MULTIPARTS" (Returns the number of multi-part segments of this entity) + "GET_MULTIPART" method (Returns the specified multipart segment of this entity).

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am creating report from specification and the released report is available in CG54 transaction as you can see in the below image.

I have used few standard function module and custom function module inside the report and in both function module I have placed Session and external breakpoints.

When I click on display document on front end pc that is marked in green the standard FM C14N_SYMBOL_STACK_PUSH gets triggered, but my custom FM will not be triggered.

 

Please can you help me understand how to trigger my CUSTOM FM when using CG54 to generate report..

Thomas

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: It seems that there is no answer maybe I am not understandable. In a JSON it is the same to send an element as table with the following ways: 1. {"table": [ {"a": 1, "b": 2 }, {"c": 1, "d": 2 } ] } and 2. {"table": {"a": 1, "b": 2 }, {"c": 1, "d": 2 } }.

entry.title: Re: Consume external OData as Batch Request
entry.content: Yes, that's what I'm trying to achieve. Before doing these code-pull ups 🙂 I wanted to make sure, there isn't a nicer/easier way. Thanks for your feedback Tomas!

entry.title: Output Type SPED trigger Inbound Delivery after PGI for Inter-Company STO's Outbound delivery
entry.content:
Inter-company purchasing is a very common business scenario in many SAP projects. In project practice, inter-company STO (or cross-company STO) is used to realize this process.                                     Different projects have different practices:

  • In some projects, one-step transfer is adopted, that is, after the issue company post goods issues by VL02N, the receiving company automatically completes the goods receipt posting.
  • In some projects, two-step transfer is adopted, that is, the issue company first performs goods issue posting, and then the receiving company performs goods receipt posting separately.
  • In some projects, inbound delivery needs to be created on the receiving side. Through the system settings, SAP can automatically trigger the inbound delivery document in this scenario after the goods issue posted by the issue company.

In this document we will discuss how to use the SAP standard output type SPED, to realize the function of automatically triggering the inbound delivery after the goods issue of outbound delivery is posted.              The Configuration Steps we have to maintain:                                                                             Maintain Output Types:                                                                                                           Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions –> Output Control –> Output Determination –> Maintain Output Determination for Outbound Deliveries –> Maintain Output Types"SPED" is the standard Output Type.Double click on the Output Type “SPED”.                                                                                                      These are the standard settings for the Output Type SPED.Maintain Output determination procedure: Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions  –> Output Control –> Output Determination –> Maintain Output Determination for Outbound Deliveries –> Maintain Output Determination ProcedureV10000 is the Standard Procedure. We can Create the New procedure by clicking on the New Entries or by Copying from the standard one. Select the Procedure and click on the control data field as shown.We can assign the condition type as “SPED” by clicking on the New Entries as shown.                            Enter Step as –> 50, Count as –> 1. After Maintaining the data click on the save button.Remember that for the requirement 408/1, the inbound delivery will be triggered AFTER goods issue posting for outbound delivery.                                                                                                                    Assign Output Determination Procedures:                                                                                              Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions –> Output Control –> Output Determination –> Maintain Output Determination for Outbound Deliveries –> Assign Output Determination ProceduresAssign Output Type as “SPED” to the Output Determination Procedure and delivery Type. After Completion of assigning click on the save button.

  • Note: Before Maintaining the Condition record, Maintain the back-end settings required for Inter-Company or Cross-Company STO. (Maintain the settings Assign the Delivery Type (NLCC) to the Document type and Supplying Plant.)
  • If we can’t maintain the setting, we can’t assign the partner in the Condition Record. The system throws an Error that Customer Master Data does not exist.

Maintain the Condition Record:                                                                                                            Enter output Type as “SPED”.

Make sure that the value of the field Partner cannot be empty in this condition record. After Maintaining the required data click on the save button.Assign Receiving Point for Inbound Deliveries:                                                                    Configuration:  SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions –> Shipping Point and Goods Receiving Point Determination –> Assign Goods Receiving Points for Inbound DeliveriesWe can maintain the Shipping Points to the Plant and storage location by clicking on the New Entries or by copying from the standard one.

  • We need to assign shipping point for all receiving plant/storage location combination.

After Assign the data click on the save button. Set Up Confirmation Control:                                                                                                  Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Material Management –> Purchasing –> Confirmations –> Set UP Confirmation controlWe can create the Confirmation Control Key by clicking on the New Entries or by Copying from the Standard one. Select the Confirmation Control Key and click on the Confirmation Sequence.

  • If We copy from the Standard one the data will be updated automatically.
  • If We create by clicking on the New Entries, we need to maintain the data Manually.After Maintaining the data click on the save button.                                                                              Make sure that the check box GR-Relevant and GR Assignment Key are both selected.After Maintaining the back-end settings, Next Create the STO purchase order in ME21N.
  • Maintain the confirmation Control.

                                 Standard PO created under the number 4500000902.

  • Create the Outbound Delivery in VL10D/VL10B
  • With Reference to the Outbound Delivery Number Post the Goods Issue in VL02N

We can check whether our Output Type is triggered for Outbound Delivery in VL03N.Now check whether the inbound Delivery number is triggered or not in the Purchase Order. (Go to ME23N). The inbound delivery number is automatically triggered in the Purchase order.

Remaining process is same, The Receiving Plant will do the MIGO. Check the inbound Delivery in VLO3N.

  • We can do this Scenario for both Inter and Intra Company Code STO’s
  • We can do this Scenario for only Two-Step process.
  • If we can try it for one step process, we will get an error like this No goods receipt is possible for Purchase Order.

entry.title: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS. 

when creating adaptation project in BAS we are not getting the option to extend for this particular app. 

or is there any other way to extend this app. 

P.S : SAP WEB IDE is not available as account is in cloud foundry environment.

entry.title: Re: How to enhance the Request Material(MDG) App Lean App...
entry.content: See the parallel thread about adding custom fields to the request material fiori app.

entry.title: Re: Enable events from S/4HANA cloud to Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi,

thank you for this great step-by-step description. 

In the section "Create instance of S/4HANA cloud extensibility service", step 5 "Click on next and put instance descriptor JSON" I had to add:

{
"emClientId": "S4HC",
"systemName": "S4HANA Cloud"
}

instead of the JSON that you show. The JSON that you show appears in the Service Descriptor in Event Mesh.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app...
entry.content: See the parallel thread about adding custom fields to the request material fiori app. You may follow up on the answers provided there.

entry.title: Re: Customer COE – Accelerate Your Journey to the Cloud with SAP Customer Evolution Program
entry.content: Thanks for the heads-up, very valuable!

entry.title: Codice di riferimento Binance “V6DOM2VV”
entry.content:
Ottieni uno sconto sulle commissioni del 20% inserendo il codice "V6DOM2VV" nella casella del codice Referral di Binance! L'ID di riferimento elevato che può essere condiviso da Binance è del 20%. Binance Referral ID può essere visualizzato come un codice univoco che può essere condiviso tra gli utenti Binance.

Binance è il miglior scambio di criptovaluta al mondo in termini di affidabilità, volume delle transazioni e numero di utenti. Binance è stato scelto come il miglior exchange di criptovalute al mondo in un elenco che include molteplici criteri come volume delle transazioni, indice di fiducia, diversità delle criptovalute e numero di utenti.

entry.title: Referenční kód Binance: CERJSB5V
entry.content:
Referenční kód Binance "CERJSB5V" je jedním z nejvíce registrovaných unikátních kódů na celém světě. Referenční kód na burze Binance je program implementovaný s cílem doporučit uživatele burze a nabídnout různé výhody.

Referenční kód Binance se také vyslovuje jako Binance ID kód a není mezi nimi žádný rozdíl.

Na burze Binance mohou uživatelé pozvat další členy pomocí doporučujícího kódu a obě strany získají různé bonusy za registraci a slevy na doživotní provize. Binance patří mezi 10 nejlepších kryptoměnových burz na světě podle kritérií stanovených coinmarketcapem.

Co je referenční kód Binance?

Referenční kód Binance je promo kód, který můžete použít při registraci na burze a získat slevu na poplatek při obchodování s pákovým efektem. Stejný kód "CERJSB5V“ můžete použít také pro futures.

entry.title: Kod polecający Binance: I08V9SYO
entry.content:
Kod polecający Binance "I08V9SYO” jest jednym z najczęściej rejestrowanych unikalnych kodów na całym świecie. Kod referencyjny na giełdzie Binance to program wdrożony, aby polecać użytkowników giełdzie i oferować różne korzyści.

Kod polecający Binance jest również wymawiany jako kod identyfikacyjny Binance i nie ma między nimi żadnej różnicy.

Na giełdzie Binance użytkownicy mogą zapraszać innych członków za pomocą kodu polecającego, a obie strony otrzymają różne bonusy za rejestrację i dożywotnie rabaty prowizyjne. Binance znajduje się w pierwszej 10-tce giełd kryptowalut na świecie według kryteriów ustalonych przez coinmarketcap.

entry.title: Re: Configuring Time Based Auto-Assembly (TBAA) in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Hi is there a way in sap to automatically switch from one material (or next issue) to another when the old material is at zero?

entry.title: Re: EWM Putaway Storage Section Indicator Defaulting to I...
entry.content:
Hi,

Error message "No bin search possible. Storage types/sections/bin types incomplete" (/SCWM/PUT_BIN_DET 075) basically means that no storage type / Storage section / bin type combination is found for a destination bin search. 

I would check the setup of your putaway strategies. 

Is there a storage type search sequence maintained that finds storage type for your product. Same for storage section and bin type. 

I would first check the putaway warehouse task creation log. You can do it in the warehouse monitor -> tools -> applciation log. Search for object /SCWM/WME you might further restrict to subobject WHS_TASK. In the application log you see he detailed steps which steps in putaway warehouse task creation have been successful and when did it fail. e.g. you see of a storage type is found, but no section or bin type.

Note: you will find only an application log if logging is switched on in transaction /SCWM/ACTLOG

Best regards,

Matthias
